title: pseudopogonatherum koretrostachys

side_effects: Pseudopogonatherum koretrostachys can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues, including nausea and diarrhea, due to its high concentration of saponins. Ingestion of large amounts can also lead to vomiting, abdominal pain, and potentially life-threatening complications. In addition to gastrointestinal problems, improper use of pseudopogonatherum koretrostachys can result in allergic reactions, such as skin irritation, itching, and respiratory difficulties.
